curation_notes: Patch modifies only src/index.js, adding Object.constructor = function () {} before evaluating user code in the Node.js VM sandbox. The vulnerability is in the runInContext method of the SaferEval class. The browser counterpart (src/browser.js) already had a similar this.constructor.constructor override and was not changed by the patch. Pre-assigned class command-injection retained: CWE-94 (Code Injection) maps closely, and the sandbox escape enables arbitrary code execution similar to command injection.
